step.title: Removing previous build artifact's manifest file
Attempting to fetch target branch HEAD
Cleaning up temp folders from previous zip deployments and extracting pushed zip file /tmp/zipdeploy/16f06e48-d4d2-49d4-b09c-07744540b43a.zip (0.09 MB) to /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted
ChmodRecursive Process exited with total time taken in ms: 257
Error occurred
step.text: [notice] A new release of pip is available: 24.0 -> 26.1.1 [notice] To update, run: pip install --upgrade pip rm: cannot remove '/tmp/zipdeploy/extracted/oryx-build-commands.txt': No such file or directory /bin/bash -c "oryx build /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted -o /home/site/wwwroot --platform python --platform-version 3.11 -p virtualenv_name=antenv --log-file /tmp/build-debug.log -i /tmp/8deae37a8eeb2f4 --compress-destination-dir | tee /tmp/oryx-build.log ; exit $PIPESTATUS "
